questions.question: Describe the main difference between a data flow model and a behavioural model, and provide an example of each.
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of each model

questions.question: What are the advantages and disadvantages of using a data flow model in digital design and computer organization?
questions.hint: Consider the trade-offs between different design approaches

questions.question: Explain how to translate a behavioural model into a data flow model, and provide an example of a simple circuit.
questions.hint: Focus on the steps involved in the translation process
